name: ChatGPT
tagline: The world's most popular AI chatbot by OpenAI
description: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship conversational AI. Supports GPT-4o with vision, file uploads, code execution, browsing, and custom GPTs. Used by over 100M people worldwide.

name: Claude
tagline: Anthropic's AI assistant — thoughtful, safe, powerful
description: Claude by Anthropic excels at long-context reasoning, coding, and nuanced writing. Claude 3.5 Sonnet leads benchmarks in coding and analysis with a 200K token context window.

name: Gemini
tagline: Google's multimodal AI across text, image, audio & video
description: Gemini 1.5 Pro offers up to 1M token context, native multimodality, and deep Google ecosystem integration including Search, Docs, and Gmail.

name: Grok
tagline: xAI's witty, real-time AI with X/Twitter integration
description: Grok by xAI provides real-time information via X (Twitter) integration. Grok 3 features deep research, image generation, and a distinctive conversational personality.

name: DeepSeek
tagline: China's breakthrough open-source LLM rivaling GPT-4
description: DeepSeek R1 matches GPT-4 on benchmarks at a fraction of the cost. Fully open-source weights with strong coding and math reasoning capabilities. Took the AI world by storm.

name: Microsoft Copilot
tagline: AI assistant built into Windows, Office 365, and Bing
description: Microsoft Copilot brings GPT-4o and DALL-E 3 to Windows, Edge, Bing, and all Microsoft 365 apps. Integrates with your files, emails, and calendar seamlessly.

name: Meta AI
tagline: Llama-powered AI inside WhatsApp, Instagram & Facebook
description: Meta AI uses Llama 3 to power free AI assistants across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger. Available in 12+ countries with image generation via Imagine.

name: Mistral Chat
tagline: Efficient European LLM with frontier performance
description: Mistral Large 2 and Mistral Small offer best-in-class performance per token. Le Chat provides a free chat interface with all Mistral models including Mistral Next.

name: Groq
tagline: Ultra-fast LLM inference — Llama & Mixtral at 500+ tok/s
description: Groq's custom LPU chip delivers the fastest LLM inference available. Free API access to Llama 3, Mixtral, and Gemma models at speeds exceeding 500 tokens/second.

name: Ollama
tagline: Run open-source LLMs locally — Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek
description: Ollama makes it trivial to run large language models on your local machine. Supports Llama 3, Mistral, DeepSeek, Phi, Gemma, and 100+ models with a simple CLI and REST API.

name: Hugging Face
tagline: The GitHub of AI — 800K+ models, datasets, and Spaces
description: Hugging Face hosts 800,000+ open-source models, 150,000+ datasets, and Spaces for running demos. The go-to hub for the AI research community and ML practitioners worldwide.

name: LM Studio
tagline: Desktop app for running LLMs locally — no cloud needed
description: LM Studio provides a polished desktop interface for downloading and running local LLMs. Supports GGUF models from Hugging Face and exposes a local OpenAI-compatible API.

name: Perplexity AI
tagline: AI-powered answer engine with real-time web search
description: Perplexity combines LLMs with live web search to deliver cited, accurate answers. Pro users get GPT-4o, Claude, and Sonar models with up-to-date information from the web.

name: Phind
tagline: AI search engine built for developers and technical queries
description: Phind combines web search with LLMs to answer technical and coding questions with citations. Powered by Phind-70B, fine-tuned for programming and technical domains.

name: Consensus
tagline: Search 200M+ research papers with AI-powered synthesis
description: Consensus searches peer-reviewed scientific papers and synthesizes findings with AI. Ideal for researchers, students, and professionals needing evidence-based, cited answers.

name: You.com
tagline: AI search with real-time web access and app integrations
description: You.com offers AI-powered search with real-time results, multi-step research, and integrations with Gmail, GitHub, and Slack. YouPro unlocks advanced AI and custom search modes.

name: Elicit
tagline: AI research assistant that automates literature review
description: Elicit finds and analyzes academic papers, extracting key findings, summaries, and evidence tables. Trusted by 2M+ researchers for systematic literature review automation.

name: Midjourney
tagline: The gold standard for AI image generation and art
description: Midjourney v6.1 produces photorealistic and artistic images from text prompts. Operates via Discord and web interface. Known for unmatched aesthetic quality and consistency.

name: DALL-E 3
tagline: OpenAI's text-to-image model with precise prompt adherence
description: DALL-E 3 understands nuanced text prompts to generate highly accurate images. Integrated directly into ChatGPT Plus — no separate login needed. Supports inpainting and editing.

name: Stable Diffusion
tagline: The open-source image model powering thousands of tools
description: Stable Diffusion by Stability AI is the foundational open-source model. SD 3.5 and custom LoRAs enable fine-tuned, private image generation. Run locally or via API.

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: Generative AI built for creatives — safe for commercial use
description: Adobe Firefly is trained on licensed content, making all outputs commercially safe. Deep integration with Photoshop, Illustrator, and Express for professional creative workflows.

name: Ideogram
tagline: Best-in-class AI images with perfect text rendering
description: Ideogram 2.0 solves the hardest problem in AI images — legible text inside images. Ideal for logos, posters, and branded content with precise typography and consistent style.

name: Flux
tagline: Black Forest Labs' open-source model surpassing Midjourney
description: FLUX.1 by Black Forest Labs delivers photorealistic quality rivaling Midjourney. Open weights available, API access, and fast generation — the new open-source image standard.

name: Leonardo AI
tagline: AI image platform for game assets, concept art & design
description: Leonardo AI specializes in high-quality AI images for games, concept art, and product design. Offers fine-tuning, Canvas editor, Motion video, and a generous free tier.

name: Sora
tagline: OpenAI's text-to-video model — cinematic AI video generation
description: Sora generates realistic videos up to 60 seconds from text or image prompts. Supports storyboarding, re-mixing, and video-to-video transformation with world model understanding.

name: Runway ML
tagline: Professional AI video generation used by major studios
description: Runway Gen-3 Alpha produces high-fidelity, consistent video with fine-grained motion control. Used by major film studios for professional AI video production and visual effects.

name: Pika Labs
tagline: Fast, fun AI video generation for content creators
description: Pika 2.0 generates and edits videos from text and images. Features scene addition, lip sync, and Pikaffects for viral motion effects. Great for social media creators.

name: Kling AI
tagline: Kuaishou's video generation with realistic physics simulation
description: Kling AI from Kuaishou generates realistic 2-minute videos with accurate physics simulation and character consistency. Strong at human motion and real-world scenarios.

name: Luma Dream Machine
tagline: Cinematic video generation with realistic motion from Luma AI
description: Dream Machine generates high-quality realistic videos from text and images. Known for smooth camera motion, realistic physics, and consistent characters across frames.

name: HeyGen
tagline: AI video avatars and real-time voice translation for business
description: HeyGen creates talking avatar videos from photos and scripts, with real-time voice translation in 40+ languages. Used by enterprises for training, marketing, and communications.

name: Synthesia
tagline: Enterprise AI video creation with photo-realistic avatars
description: Synthesia turns scripts into professional videos with AI avatars in 140+ languages. Trusted by 50,000+ companies for L&D, HR, and marketing content at scale.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: The world's most adopted AI coding assistant
description: GitHub Copilot uses GPT-4o and Claude to suggest code, explain functions, fix bugs, and write tests. Integrates with VS Code, JetBrains, and all major IDEs. 1.8M+ paid users.

name: Cursor
tagline: The AI-first code editor — VS Code with AI superpowers
description: Cursor is a VS Code fork with deep AI integration: tab completion, multi-file editing, natural language code changes, and an AI chat that understands your entire codebase.

name: Windsurf
tagline: Codeium's agentic IDE that codes alongside you
description: Windsurf by Codeium is an agentic code editor with Cascade — an AI that plans and executes multi-step coding tasks across your entire project. Powered by the SWE-1 model.

name: v0 by Vercel
tagline: Generate React UI components from text — ship instantly
description: v0 generates React/Next.js UI with Tailwind CSS from text descriptions. Fully editable in-browser, deployable to Vercel instantly. The fastest way from idea to production UI.

name: Bolt.new
tagline: Full-stack app builder — from prompt to deployed app
description: Bolt.new by StackBlitz builds, runs, and deploys full-stack web apps from a single prompt. Supports React, Next.js, Vue, Node, and more in an in-browser dev environment.

name: Replit AI
tagline: Build and deploy apps in the browser with AI
description: Replit Agent writes complete apps from text descriptions while Replit AI helps debug, explain, and improve code. Instant deployment with Replit's cloud infrastructure.

name: Devin
tagline: The first fully autonomous AI software engineer
description: Devin by Cognition is an autonomous agent that plans and executes long engineering tasks: write code, debug, run tests, browse the web, and deploy — completely independently.

name: Tabnine
tagline: Privacy-first AI code completion for enterprise teams
description: Tabnine provides AI code completions with a strong focus on privacy and security. Supports private deployment, custom model training on your codebase, and all major IDEs.

name: Amazon Q Developer
tagline: AWS's AI coding assistant for cloud-native development
description: Amazon Q Developer offers code suggestions, security scans, app modernization, and AWS integration help. Understands AWS services, IaC (CDK, CloudFormation), and enterprise code.

name: LangChain
tagline: The framework for building LLM-powered applications
description: LangChain is the leading open-source framework for chaining LLM calls, building RAG pipelines, and creating agents. LangSmith provides full observability. Used by hundreds of thousands of devs.

name: CrewAI
tagline: Multi-agent framework for orchestrating AI teams
description: CrewAI enables building multi-agent systems where specialized AI agents collaborate on complex tasks. Role-based agents with tools, memory, and delegation capabilities.

name: n8n
tagline: Open-source workflow automation with native AI nodes
description: n8n connects 400+ apps with visual workflow automation. Native AI nodes for LLM calls, embeddings, and vector stores make it the top open-source AI automation platform.

name: Zapier AI
tagline: AI-powered automation for 6,000+ apps
description: Zapier Copilot builds automated workflows from natural language descriptions. AI Actions let ChatGPT and other LLMs trigger any Zapier-connected app via a single API call.

name: AutoGPT
tagline: The original autonomous AI agent — browse, code, and act
description: AutoGPT is the pioneer autonomous AI agent that sparked the agent revolution. Chains GPT-4 calls to complete multi-step tasks with web access, file management, and code execution.

name: Make
tagline: Visual automation platform — the no-code AI workflow builder
description: Make (formerly Integromat) provides a visual drag-and-drop automation builder with 1,800+ app integrations and native AI modules for building intelligent workflows.

name: Relevance AI
tagline: Build and deploy AI agents and tools without code
description: Relevance AI lets non-developers build AI agents, tools, and multi-agent teams visually. Deploy AI workforce automations that integrate with CRM, email, Slack, and custom APIs.

name: Jasper
tagline: Enterprise AI content platform for marketing teams
description: Jasper generates on-brand marketing copy, blogs, ads, and social content at scale. Features brand voice training, templates, and team collaboration for enterprise marketing teams.

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity
description: Grammarly's AI catches grammar errors, improves tone, rewrites sentences, and generates full drafts. Works across 500,000+ apps via browser extension. 30M+ daily users.

name: Copy.ai
tagline: AI workflows for marketing and GTM content at scale
description: Copy.ai builds AI-powered GTM workflows for sales and marketing teams. Generates prospect research, email sequences, social posts, and blog content from a single brief.

name: Writesonic
tagline: AI writing for SEO-optimized articles, ads, and landing pages
description: Writesonic generates long-form SEO articles, product descriptions, Google ads, and landing pages. Chatsonic adds real-time web search and image generation to the mix.

name: Quillbot
tagline: AI paraphrasing, summarization, and grammar tool
description: QuillBot paraphrases, summarizes, and improves academic and professional writing. Features a Citation Generator, Grammar Checker, and Co-Writer for seamless document editing.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: The most realistic AI voice generation and cloning platform
description: ElevenLabs produces studio-quality AI voices with emotion, pacing, and nuance. Supports voice cloning from 30 seconds of audio, 32 languages, and a Conversational AI API.

name: Suno AI
tagline: Create complete songs from text — vocals, music, lyrics
description: Suno generates full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from a short text description. v4 delivers radio-quality output across 50+ music genres in under a minute.

name: Udio
tagline: High-fidelity AI music generation with genre control
description: Udio creates professional-quality music from text prompts with fine control over genre, mood, tempo, and instrumentation. Supports stem separation and song extension.

name: Murf AI
tagline: Professional AI voiceovers for videos and presentations
description: Murf offers 200+ ultra-realistic AI voices for creating voiceovers, podcasts, and explainer videos. Includes a voice studio with pitch, speed, and emphasis controls.

name: Descript
tagline: Edit video and audio by editing the transcript
description: Descript lets you edit video and podcasts like a document — cut, reorder, and remove filler words by editing text. Features AI overdub for voice cloning and screen recording.

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI writing, summarization, and Q&A inside your workspace
description: Notion AI adds a writing assistant, document summarizer, and Q&A over your workspace directly inside Notion. Draft, edit, translate, and extract action items from any page.

name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
tagline: AI across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams
description: M365 Copilot embeds GPT-4 into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams — drafting emails, analyzing spreadsheets, generating decks, and summarizing meetings automatically.

name: Otter.ai
tagline: AI meeting assistant — transcription, notes, and action items
description: Otter.ai transcribes meetings in real-time, generates AI summaries, and extracts action items. Integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams. Used by 1M+ professionals.

name: Reclaim AI
tagline: AI calendar assistant that optimizes your schedule automatically
description: Reclaim automatically blocks time for tasks, habits, and meetings based on your priorities. Learns your preferences to protect focus time and reduce context switching.

name: Figma AI
tagline: AI-powered design tools built natively into Figma
description: Figma AI adds generative design features: text-to-UI prototypes, auto-rename layers, asset search with natural language, and AI-powered component suggestions all inside Figma.

name: Framer AI
tagline: Build and publish interactive websites from text prompts
description: Framer AI generates complete interactive websites from natural language. Supports custom animations, responsive layouts, CMS, and one-click publishing with custom domains.

name: Canva AI
tagline: AI design for everyone — images, video, presentations
description: Canva's AI suite includes Magic Design, Magic Write, text-to-image, background remover, and AI video. 170M+ users create social content, marketing, and presentations with Canva AI.

name: Uizard
tagline: Turn sketches and screenshots into editable UI designs
description: Uizard converts hand-drawn sketches, screenshots, or text prompts into polished UI wireframes and prototypes. Ideal for product managers and non-designers to visualize ideas fast.

name: Cohere
tagline: Enterprise-grade LLMs and embeddings for business AI
description: Cohere provides Command R+ for RAG and tool use, Embed for semantic search, and Rerank for relevance. Purpose-built for enterprise with on-prem deployment options.

name: Poe by Quora
tagline: One app to access GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and 100+ bots
description: Poe aggregates ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and hundreds of custom AI bots in a single app. Build and monetize custom AI bots with Poe's creator platform.

name: Character.ai
tagline: Chat with AI characters — celebs, fictional, and custom
description: Character.ai lets you create and chat with AI personas from famous characters, historical figures, or entirely custom personalities. 20M+ daily users, especially popular with Gen Z.

name: Pi by Inflection
tagline: Your personal AI — empathetic, supportive, always available
description: Pi is designed for open-ended conversation, emotional support, and personal growth. Built by Inflection AI with a warm, empathetic tone focused on the individual user experience.

name: Together AI
tagline: Run open-source LLMs at scale — 200+ models, fast API
description: Together AI provides a unified API to run 200+ open-source models including Llama 3, Mixtral, DBRX, and Qwen. Competitive pricing, fast inference, and fine-tuning support.

name: Kimi by Moonshot
tagline: China's frontier LLM with 128K context and math reasoning
description: Kimi by Moonshot AI is a Chinese frontier LLM excelling at long documents (128K context), math reasoning, and multimodal inputs. Rapidly gaining global users for research tasks.

name: Qwen by Alibaba
tagline: Alibaba's open-source LLM family rivaling GPT-4
description: Qwen2.5 from Alibaba Cloud is a top open-source LLM family with models ranging from 0.5B to 72B parameters. Excels at coding, math, and multilingual tasks with fully open weights.

name: GPT4All
tagline: Run LLMs 100% offline on your CPU — no GPU needed
description: GPT4All by Nomic AI runs Llama, Mistral, and other LLMs entirely offline on your CPU. No internet, no API keys, complete privacy. Available for Mac, Windows, and Linux.

name: Jan.ai
tagline: Open-source, offline AI assistant with a beautiful desktop UI
description: Jan is an open-source desktop app for running LLMs locally with a polished UI. Supports model import from Hugging Face, built-in model hub, and local REST API.

name: Replicate
tagline: Run any open-source AI model via a simple API
description: Replicate hosts thousands of open-source AI models — image, video, audio, LLMs — accessible via a universal API. Pay per second with no infrastructure management required.

name: Playground AI
tagline: Free AI image generation with real-time canvas editing
description: Playground AI offers free image generation with a real-time canvas editor. Blend AI images with photography, create commercial-grade artwork, and fine-tune models for brand consistency.

name: Bing Image Creator
tagline: Free DALL-E 3 image generation inside Microsoft Bing
description: Bing Image Creator provides free access to DALL-E 3 through Microsoft's Bing AI. No subscription needed — just a Microsoft account. Generates 4 images per prompt with high quality.

name: NightCafe
tagline: AI art community with multiple generation engines
description: NightCafe offers SDXL, DALL-E, and other engines in a creative community platform. Features daily AI art challenges, credit system, and social sharing. Great for hobbyists.

name: DreamStudio
tagline: Stability AI's official Stable Diffusion web interface
description: DreamStudio is Stability AI's official platform for Stable Diffusion XL and SD 3.5. Offers advanced controls including steps, CFG scale, ControlNet, and image-to-image editing.

name: Krea AI
tagline: Real-time AI image generation with live canvas control
description: Krea AI offers real-time image generation that updates as you draw or type. Features AI upscaling, enhanced editing, pattern generation, and AI video — all at interactive speeds.

name: Magnific AI
tagline: AI image upscaler that hallucinates beautiful details
description: Magnific AI upscales and enhances images by intelligently adding photorealistic details. Can upscale up to 10x while improving skin, textures, and fine details dramatically.

name: Photoroom
tagline: AI photo editor — remove backgrounds, create product shots
description: Photoroom removes backgrounds, generates AI backgrounds, and creates studio-quality product photos in seconds. Used by 150M+ users and integrated with Shopify for e-commerce.

name: Civitai
tagline: The largest community for Stable Diffusion models and LoRAs
description: Civitai hosts 100,000+ community-trained Stable Diffusion models, LoRAs, and embeddings. The go-to repository for custom AI art styles and on-site generation with community models.

name: Hailuo AI
tagline: MiniMax's viral AI video with hyper-realistic motion
description: Hailuo AI by MiniMax generates highly realistic videos from text or images. Went viral for its ultra-realistic human movement and facial expressions. Offers fast generation speeds.

name: InVideo AI
tagline: Turn ideas into polished videos with AI narration
description: InVideo AI generates complete videos from text prompts with stock footage, AI voiceover, and automatic editing. Ideal for content creators producing YouTube and social media videos at scale.

name: Vidu
tagline: China's Sora rival with high-fidelity video generation
description: Vidu by Shengshu Technology generates cinematic videos with consistent characters and scene transitions. Considered China's answer to Sora with impressive physics simulation.

name: PixVerse
tagline: AI video generation with special effects and lip sync
description: PixVerse creates videos with special visual effects, transformation sequences, and accurate lip sync from reference images. Popular for creative and viral content generation.

name: Haiper
tagline: Fast AI video generation with motion effects
description: Haiper generates short videos and image animations with creative motion effects. Known for fast generation speed and distinctive visual style. Growing rapidly among creators.

name: CapCut AI
tagline: ByteDance's AI video editor for social media creators
description: CapCut by ByteDance is the most downloaded video editor app with AI features: auto-captions, background removal, AI avatars, voice cloning, and CapCut AI video generation.

name: Genmo
tagline: Creative AI video generation with world model understanding
description: Genmo's Mochi 1 is an open-source video generation model with exceptional motion quality. Genmo's platform allows creating dynamic, fluid videos from text with high consistency.

name: Aider
tagline: AI pair programmer in your terminal — edit code with LLMs
description: Aider is a CLI coding assistant that edits code across your entire Git repo using GPT-4o, Claude, or Gemini. Understands your codebase context and applies multi-file changes automatically.

name: Continue.dev
tagline: Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code and JetBrains
description: Continue is an open-source AI code assistant that connects any LLM to your IDE. Supports local models via Ollama, cloud APIs, and custom model configurations for full control.

name: Sourcegraph Cody
tagline: AI coding assistant with enterprise codebase context
description: Cody by Sourcegraph provides AI code completion and chat with deep understanding of your entire enterprise codebase. Supports code search, refactoring, and custom context from Git repos.

name: Lovable
tagline: Build full-stack web apps with AI — no coding required
description: Lovable (formerly GPT Engineer) builds complete full-stack apps from natural language. Supports React, Supabase backend, Stripe payments, and one-click deployment to production.

name: Supermaven
tagline: The fastest AI code completion — 1M token context
description: Supermaven provides ultra-fast inline code completion with a 1M token context window for understanding large codebases. Available for VS Code and JetBrains. Free tier available.

name: JetBrains AI
tagline: Native AI assistant across all JetBrains IDEs
description: JetBrains AI Assistant integrates with IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, and all JetBrains IDEs. Provides context-aware completions, refactoring, documentation, and AI chat.

name: Cline
tagline: Autonomous AI coding agent inside VS Code
description: Cline (formerly Claude Dev) is an open-source VS Code extension that autonomously edits files, runs terminal commands, and builds complete features using Claude or any LLM via API.

name: OpenHands
tagline: Open-source software engineering agent — formerly OpenDevin
description: OpenHands (OpenDevin) is an open-source platform for autonomous software engineering agents. Agents can modify code, run commands, browse the web, and complete full engineering tasks.

name: Flowise
tagline: Open-source low-code LLM app builder with drag-and-drop
description: Flowise lets you build LLM chains, RAG pipelines, and agents visually with a drag-and-drop interface. Fully open-source and self-hostable, integrates with LangChain and LlamaIndex.

name: Dify
tagline: Open-source LLM app development platform
description: Dify is an open-source platform for building production-grade LLM apps with RAG, agents, and workflows. Features a visual prompt editor, model hub, and one-click cloud deployment.

name: Botpress
tagline: Open-source chatbot platform with GPT-native agents
description: Botpress is an open-source platform for building GPT-powered chatbots and conversational agents. Native LLM integration with a visual flow builder and 100+ integrations.

name: Voiceflow
tagline: Design, build, and deploy conversational AI agents
description: Voiceflow is the collaborative platform for building AI agents and chatbots. Used by 250,000+ teams to create voice assistants, customer support bots, and conversational experiences.

name: BabyAGI
tagline: The original task-driven autonomous AI agent
description: BabyAGI pioneered task-driven autonomous agents using GPT-4 to create, prioritize, and execute tasks in a loop. A seminal open-source project that influenced the entire AI agent ecosystem.

name: Stack AI
tagline: Enterprise AI workflow builder for automating business tasks
description: Stack AI enables enterprises to build AI pipelines for document analysis, data extraction, customer support, and internal tools. SOC 2 compliant with on-prem deployment options.

name: Taskade AI
tagline: AI-powered project management with autonomous agents
description: Taskade combines project management, mind maps, and AI agents in one platform. Custom AI agents can research, write, and execute tasks within projects with team collaboration.

name: Rytr
tagline: Affordable AI writing tool for 40+ content use cases
description: Rytr is a budget-friendly AI writer supporting 40+ content types and 30+ languages. Generates blog posts, emails, ads, social posts, and more. Free tier available.

name: Hypotenuse AI
tagline: AI content platform for e-commerce product descriptions
description: Hypotenuse AI generates bulk product descriptions, blog articles, and social ads from minimal input. Specializes in e-commerce with Shopify integration and brand voice training.

name: Wordtune
tagline: AI that rewrites your sentences for clarity and tone
description: Wordtune rewrites, expands, and summarizes text to improve clarity, tone, and engagement. Features AI summaries of articles and documents. Works via browser extension across the web.

name: Simplified
tagline: All-in-one AI platform for design, video, and writing
description: Simplified combines AI image generation, video creation, graphic design, and content writing in a single platform. Ideal for social media managers and marketing teams seeking one tool.

name: Anyword
tagline: Data-driven AI copywriting with performance prediction
description: Anyword generates marketing copy and predicts its performance score before publishing. Features audience targeting, brand voice training, and integrations with major ad platforms.

name: Sudowrite
tagline: AI writing tool built for novelists and fiction writers
description: Sudowrite is purpose-built for fiction writers — it brainstorms plot ideas, writes descriptions, generates dialogue, and helps overcome writer's block with story-aware suggestions.

name: Longshot AI
tagline: Fact-checked AI content writer for accurate long-form articles
description: Longshot generates fact-checked, SEO-optimized blog posts and articles with real web citations. Unique FactCheck feature validates AI-generated claims in real time.

name: Play.ht
tagline: Ultra-realistic AI voice generation and cloning API
description: Play.ht generates natural-sounding AI voices from text in 900+ voices across 142 languages. Offers voice cloning from 10 seconds of audio and a developer API for real-time TTS.

name: Speechify
tagline: AI text-to-speech app — read anything 4.5x faster
description: Speechify converts articles, PDFs, emails, and books into natural-sounding audio using AI voices. Popular for accessibility and productivity with 20M+ users and Chrome extension.

name: OpenAI Whisper
tagline: Open-source speech recognition model from OpenAI
description: Whisper is OpenAI's open-source automatic speech recognition model trained on 680K hours of multilingual audio. Handles accents, noise, and multiple languages with high accuracy.

name: AssemblyAI
tagline: Speech AI API — transcription, speakers, sentiment, and LeMUR
description: AssemblyAI provides enterprise speech-to-text with speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, entity detection, and LeMUR for applying LLMs to audio. High accuracy, low latency API.

name: Deepgram
tagline: Real-time speech recognition API built for developers
description: Deepgram's Nova-2 model delivers best-in-class real-time transcription with 30% lower error rate than competitors. Ideal for call centers, live captions, and voice AI applications.

name: Adobe Podcast
tagline: AI audio tools — enhance speech and remove noise for free
description: Adobe Podcast's Enhance Speech tool removes background noise and microphone imperfections from any audio recording instantly. Free to use, no Adobe subscription required.

name: Podcastle
tagline: AI podcast studio — record, edit, and publish from browser
description: Podcastle is a browser-based podcast production suite with AI noise cancellation, transcript-based editing, AI voice cloning, and one-click publishing to all podcast platforms.

name: Exa AI
tagline: Neural web search API for AI applications
description: Exa (formerly Metaphor) is a web search API designed for LLM applications. Returns high-quality, semantically relevant results with full page contents — ideal for RAG and research agents.

name: SciSpace
tagline: AI copilot for reading and understanding research papers
description: SciSpace lets you chat with scientific papers, get plain-English explanations, extract data, and ask follow-up questions across 270M+ research papers. Great for non-expert researchers.

name: ResearchRabbit
tagline: AI literature map for discovering connected research
description: ResearchRabbit visualizes academic paper relationships as an interactive map. Discovers related papers, authors, and citation networks automatically. Syncs with Zotero and Google Scholar.

name: Semantic Scholar
tagline: AI-powered academic search from the Allen Institute
description: Semantic Scholar by the Allen Institute for AI searches 220M+ academic papers with AI-powered relevance ranking. Features TLDR summaries, citation graphs, and research feeds.

name: Mem AI
tagline: AI-powered note-taking that organizes itself
description: Mem uses AI to automatically organize notes, surface related memories, and answer questions across your entire knowledge base. No folders needed — Mem makes everything findable.

name: Fireflies.ai
tagline: AI meeting recorder — transcribe, summarize, search calls
description: Fireflies records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings across Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams. AI-powered search across all your meeting history with CRM sync and action item extraction.

name: tldv
tagline: AI meeting recorder with speaker-attributed summaries
description: tldv records Zoom and Google Meet calls with AI-generated summaries, speaker attribution, and timestamped highlights. Integrates with HubSpot, Salesforce, and Notion.

name: Fathom
tagline: Free AI meeting assistant — notes, summaries, follow-ups
description: Fathom records and summarizes Zoom calls for free with AI highlights, action item detection, and CRM sync. Rated #1 AI meeting assistant on G2 with a generous free plan.

name: Grain
tagline: AI meeting highlights and coaching for sales teams
description: Grain records, transcribes, and creates highlight reels from sales and customer calls. AI coaching surfaces deal risks, talk-to-listen ratios, and key moments for revenue teams.

name: Motion
tagline: AI task manager that builds your perfect schedule
description: Motion automatically plans your day by scheduling tasks, meetings, and deadlines based on priority and available time. AI reschedules everything when plans change to keep you on track.

name: Sunsama
tagline: Daily planning ritual with AI task prioritization
description: Sunsama guides you through a structured daily planning ritual that pulls tasks from Asana, Notion, Jira, and email into a focused daily view. AI helps estimate time and prioritize.

name: Galileo AI
tagline: Generate full UI designs from text in seconds
description: Galileo AI generates production-ready UI designs from text descriptions. Creates complete screens with proper spacing, typography, and components that can be exported to Figma.

name: Visily
tagline: AI wireframing tool — sketch to prototype in minutes
description: Visily converts screenshots, PDFs, and sketches into editable wireframes with AI. Features 1,000+ UI templates and AI-generated design suggestions for rapid prototyping.

name: Khroma
tagline: AI color tool that learns your color preferences
description: Khroma uses AI trained on your preferred colors to generate unlimited palettes, gradients, and color combinations. Creates endless color inspiration tailored to your personal taste.

name: Fontjoy
tagline: AI font pairing — generate perfect typography combinations
description: Fontjoy uses neural networks to generate font pairings with optimal contrast and harmony. Lock fonts you like and regenerate pairings instantly. Free with 1,000+ Google Fonts.

name: Cerebras
tagline: World's fastest AI inference — 70B models at 2,000+ tok/s
description: Cerebras Inference runs Llama 3.1-70B at over 2,000 tokens per second using purpose-built wafer-scale chips. Free API access, dramatically faster than GPU-based alternatives.

name: Venice AI
tagline: Private, uncensored AI — no logs, no tracking
description: Venice AI runs open-source LLMs with a strict no-logging policy and uncensored outputs. Designed for users who prioritize privacy and need fewer content restrictions.

name: Perplexity Pages
tagline: AI-powered reports and visual articles from web research
description: Perplexity Pages lets you turn AI research into beautifully formatted, shareable reports with images, citations, and structured sections — like a web-powered Wikipedia with AI.

name: Pieces.app
tagline: AI code snippet manager with on-device LLM context
description: Pieces captures, organizes, and enriches code snippets with AI context. On-device LLM understands your workflow across VS Code, Chrome, and JetBrains to surface relevant snippets.

name: AgentGPT
tagline: Autonomous AI agents in your browser — no setup needed
description: AgentGPT lets you configure and deploy autonomous AI agents directly in your browser. Create goal-driven agents that research, plan, and execute tasks without any local setup.

name: Google AI Studio
tagline: Build with Gemini — the fastest way to prototype with Google AI
description: Google AI Studio is a free browser-based IDE for prototyping with Gemini models. Supports multimodal inputs, function calling, grounding with Google Search, and API key generation.

name: Sider AI
tagline: ChatGPT sidebar for any website — Claude, GPT-4, Gemini
description: Sider is a browser extension that adds a ChatGPT sidebar to any webpage. Access Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, and 30+ AI models for summarizing, translating, and discussing any web content.

name: Napkin AI
tagline: Turn text into visual diagrams and infographics instantly
description: Napkin AI converts written content into relevant visuals — flowcharts, diagrams, timelines, and infographics — automatically. Ideal for presentations, reports, and explainer content.

name: Gamma
tagline: AI presentation maker — slides, docs, and webpages in minutes
description: Gamma creates AI-generated presentations, documents, and web pages from a brief. Smart formatting, beautiful themes, and real-time collaboration. Export to PowerPoint or publish instantly.

name: Ideogram Canvas
tagline: Infinite AI canvas for generating and editing images
description: Ideogram Canvas provides an infinite canvas for placing, combining, and regenerating AI images. Edit sections, blend multiple generations, and create complex multi-element compositions.

name: Lobe Chat
tagline: Open-source ChatGPT UI for local and cloud LLMs
description: Lobe Chat is a beautiful, open-source chat interface supporting local Ollama models, OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and custom endpoints. Features plugins, file uploads, and voice chat.
